title: Greeting function
prompt_md:
Write a function `greet(name)` that **returns** the string `Hello, <name>!`.

For example, `greet('Asha')` should return `Hello, Asha!`.

Remember: a backend almost always **returns** a value (so it can be sent in a response). Use `return`, not `print`.
hints: Use an f-string: f"Hello, {name}!". The f prefix turns on the {} substitution.
Don't print the value — return it, so the test can read it back.
